entries.plain: Take it now at market — fastest fill, but the worst price of the three. Price is already extended from value (medium chase).

decision.reason: Short RSI Divergence v2 into a strong bullish tape (84.6); higher-TF bullish with no turn confirmation. Knife-catch — stand aside; the long is the tape-aligned trade.

stop_preview.note: advisory preview — live stop unchanged (11b will anchor to structure)

candlestick_patterns.description: Bearish Engulfing — sellers completely overwhelmed buyers
Bullish Harami — small bullish bar inside prior bearish body
Shooting Star — long upper shadow, bearish reversal signal
Pin Bar — strong rejection of highs
